# One-step Console

> 像导播一样编排你的工作现场

### 内建组件

#### 基础版

- [FaAlert 提示](/components/basic/OcAlert.md)
- [FaAvatar 头像](/components/basic/OcAvatar.md)
- [FaBadge 徽章](/components/basic/OcBadge.md)
- [FaButton 按钮](/components/basic/OcButton.md)
- [FaCard 卡片](/components/basic/OcCard.md)
- [FaCheckbox 复选框](/components/basic/OcCheckbox.md)
- [FaCollapsible 折叠面板](/components/basic/OcCollapsible.md)
- [FaContextMenu 右键菜单](/components/basic/OcContextMenu.md)
- [OcDescriptions 描述列表](/components/basic/OcDescriptions.md)
- [FaDivider 分割线](/components/basic/OcDivider.md)
- [FaDrawer 抽屉](/components/basic/OcDrawer.md)
- [FaDropdown 下拉菜单](/components/basic/OcDropdown.md)
- [FaFileUpload 文件上传](/components/basic/OcFileUpload.md)
- [FaFixedBar 固定栏](/components/basic/OcFixedBar.md)
- [FaForm 表单](/components/basic/OcForm.md)
- [FaHoverCard 悬浮卡片](/components/basic/OcHoverCard.md)
- [FaIcon 图标](/components/basic/OcIcon.md)
- [FaImagePreview 图片预览](/components/basic/OcImagePreview.md)
- [FaImageUpload 图片上传](/components/basic/OcImageUpload.md)
- [FaInput 输入框](/components/basic/OcInput.md)
- [FaInputOTP 验证码输入](/components/basic/OcInputOtp.md)
- [FaKbd 键盘按键](/components/basic/OcKbd.md)
- [FaLabel 标签](/components/basic/OcLabel.md)
- [FaModal 对话框](/components/basic/OcModal.md)
- [FaNumberField 数字输入框](/components/basic/OcNumberField.md)
- [FaPageHeader 页面头部](/components/basic/OcPageHeader.md)
- [FaPageMain 页面主内容区](/components/basic/OcPageMain.md)
- [FaPagination 分页](/components/basic/OcPagination.md)
- [FaPasswordStrength 密码强度](/components/basic/OcPasswordStrength.md)
- [FaPopover 弹出框](/components/basic/OcPopover.md)
- [FaProgress 进度条](/components/basic/OcProgress.md)
- [FaRadioGroup 单选组](/components/basic/OcRadioGroup.md)
- [FaScrollArea 滚动区域](/components/basic/OcScrollArea.md)
- [FaSearchBar 搜索栏](/components/basic/OcSearchBar.md)
- [FaSelect 选择器](/components/basic/OcSelect.md)
- [FaSlider 滑块](/components/basic/OcSlider.md)
- [FaSwitch 开关](/components/basic/OcSwitch.md)
- [FaTabs 标签页](/components/basic/OcTabs.md)
- [FaTag 标签](/components/basic/OcTag.md)
- [FaTable 表格](/components/basic/OcTable.md)
- [FaTextarea 文本域](/components/basic/OcTextarea.md)
- [FaToast 轻提示](/components/basic/OcToast.md)
- [FaTooltip 文字提示](/components/basic/OcTooltip.md)
- [FaTrend 趋势标识](/components/basic/OcTrend.md)

- [FaGlowyCard 发光卡片](/components/pro/OcGlowyCard.md)
- [FaGradientButton 渐变按钮](/components/pro/OcGradientButton.md)
- [FaIconPicker 图标选择器](/components/pro/OcIconPicker.md)
- [FaInteractiveButton 交互按钮](/components/pro/OcInteractiveButton.md)
- [FaLayoutContainer 布局容器](/components/pro/OcLayoutContainer.md)
- [FaLinkPreview 链接预览](/components/pro/OcLinkPreview.md)
- [FaLoading 加载动画](/components/pro/OcLoading.md)
- [FaMarquee 滚动横幅](/components/pro/OcMarquee.md)
- [FaMention 提及](/components/pro/OcMention.md)
- [FaMultiStepLoader 多步骤加载器](/components/pro/OcMultiStepLoader.md)
- [FaParticlesBg 粒子背景](/components/pro/OcParticlesBg.md)
- [FaPatternBg 图案背景](/components/pro/OcPatternBg.md)
- [FaQrcode 二维码](/components/pro/OcQrcode.md)
- [FaScratchOff 刮刮乐](/components/pro/OcScratchOff.md)
- [FaScrollingText 滚动文字](/components/pro/OcScrollingText.md)
- [FaSmoothSwipe 平滑滑动](/components/pro/OcSmoothSwipe.md)
- [FaSparklesText 闪耀文字](/components/pro/OcSparklesText.md)
- [FaSparkline 迷你图](/components/pro/OcSparkline.md)
- [FaSpotlightCard 聚光灯卡片](/components/pro/OcSpotlightCard.md)
- [FaSteps 步骤条](/components/pro/OcSteps.md)
- [FaStorageBox 储物箱](/components/pro/OcStorageBox.md)
- [FaTextHighlight 文字高亮](/components/pro/OcTextHighlight.md)
- [FaTextShiny 流光文字](/components/pro/OcTextShiny.md)
- [FaTimeAgo 相对时间](/components/pro/OcTimeAgo.md)
- [FaTimeline 时间轴](/components/pro/OcTimeline.md)
